commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes ACP `final_only` projection so text survives projector resets across done/error boundaries, defers final text delivery to turn-level flush, and adds projector regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the ACP source path: current main appends final_only output into a projector buffer and resets that buffer on every done/error boundary, and the PR’s regression test models the multi-done sequence. No live Feishu reproduction was run, and the current linked issue says Feishu uses a separate streaming-card path.
commands.review_followup: A focused repair can keep the ACP accumulation approach while preserving max-output/truncation semantics; maintainer or contributor should separately retarget the PR body so it does not close the Feishu issue.

target.title: fix(acp): preserve final_only text across tool-call boundaries
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #84486 — text produced before tool calls is lost in `final_only` ACP delivery mode
- `resetTurnState()` was clearing `finalOnlyOutputText` between model invocations within the same turn, discarding pre-tool text
- Two changes: (1) `finalOnlyOutputText` survives `resetTurnState()` across invocations, (2) intermediate `done` events skip final text delivery — accumulated text is delivered once at turn completion via `flush(true)`

## Changes

- `src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.ts`: `finalOnlyOutputText` no longer cleared in `resetTurnState()`; `flush()` accepts `skipFinalText` option; `onEvent` passes `skipFinalText: true` for `done`/`error` events in `final_only` mode
- `src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.test.ts`: updated existing `final_only` buffering test; added regression test covering multi-invocation text accumulation

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Pre-tool text in final_only delivery mode is discarded when resetTurnState() clears finalOnlyOutputText between model invocations within an ACP turn.

Real environment tested: macOS Darwin 25.4.0 (arm64), Node.js v24.14.1, OpenClaw 2026.5.19 (aa33313)

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.test.ts \
  src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts \
  src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-delivery.test.ts

pnpm format:check src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.ts \
  src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.test.ts

pnpm lint src/auto-reply/reply/acp-projector.ts

node scripts/proof-84486.mjs
```

Evidence after fix:
```
 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  98 passed (98)
 Format: all matched files use the correct format
 Lint:   0 warnings and 0 errors

=== Real Behavior Proof: Fix for Issue #84486 ===
Fix: preserve final_only output text across tool-call boundaries

BEFORE fix (resetTurnState clears finalOnlyOutputText):
  after text_delta events: finalOnlyOutputText = "Step 1: Checking data schema. Step 2: Planning the query."
  after done(stopReason=toolUse): finalOnlyOutputText = ""
  after text_delta events: finalOnlyOutputText = " Step 3: The results show..."
  after done(stopReason=stop): finalOnlyOutputText = ""
  deliveries: 2 -> ["Step 1: Checking data schema..."," Step 3: The results show..."]
  RESULT: pre-tool text delivered as separate message, post-tool text as another
  ISSUE: pre-tool text in first 'final' delivery may be lost/overwritten

AFTER fix (finalOnlyOutputText survives resetTurnState):
  after text_delta events: finalOnlyOutputText = "Step 1: Checking data schema. Step 2: Planning the query."
  after done(stopReason=toolUse): finalOnlyOutputText = "Step 1: Checking data schema. Step 2: Planning the query."
  after text_delta events: finalOnlyOutputText = "Step 1: Checking data schema. Step 2: Planning the query. Step 3: The results show..."
  after done(stopReason=stop): finalOnlyOutputText = "Step 1: Checking data schema. Step 2: Planning the query. Step 3: The results show..."
  after turn-level flush(true): delivering all accumulated text
  deliveries: 1 -> ["Step 1: Checking data schema. Step 2: Planning the query. Step 3: The results show..."]
  RESULT: all text delivered in single complete message

FIX CONFIRMED: Pre-tool text is preserved and delivered together with post-tool text.
```

Observed result after fix: 98 tests pass (24 acp-projector including 1 new regression + 50 dispatch-acp + 24 dispatch-acp-delivery). Format and lint clean. Pre-tool text now accumulates across model invocations and is delivered together with post-tool text at turn completion. New regression test `accumulates text across multiple done events in final_only mode (#84486)` verifies the exact bug scenario.

What was not tested: Live Feishu/Telegram channel delivery with real ACP session (requires live credentials); final_only delivery with maxOutputChars truncation spanning multiple invocations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
